AbsolutePath.description: Absolute filesystem path starting with / or ~

ImageName.description: Docker image name with optional tag

InsertLocation.description: Where to insert content in file

tools.name: flowbot_get_flow
tools.description: Read a flow definition from a YAML file

path.description: Absolute path to the flow YAML definition file

tools.name: flowbot_get_state
tools.description: Get the current state of a flow instance with guidance and available actions

path.description: Absolute path to the flow instance YAML file

tools.name: flowbot_list_flows
tools.description: List all available workflow definitions in a directory

directory.description: Absolute path to the directory containing flow YAML files

tools.name: flowbot_start_flow
tools.description: Start a new workflow instance from a flow definition file

path.description: Absolute path to the flow YAML definition file

tools.name: flowbot_transition
tools.description: Advance a flow instance to a new state

path.description: Absolute path to the flow instance YAML file

tools.name: get_flow
tools.description: Retrieve a flow definition by its ID.

path.description: Absolute path to the flow .yaml file

tools.name: get_state
tools.description: Get current state information and guidance for a flow instance.

instancePath.description: Absolute path to the flow instance .yaml file

advisoryPermissions.description: Advisory list of tools recommended for this state (not enforced)

tools.name: list_flows
tools.description: List all available flow definitions with summary information.

dir.description: Absolute path to the directory containing flow .yaml files

tools.name: start_flow
tools.description: Start a new flow instance from a flow definition.

path.description: Absolute path to the flow .yaml file to start

advisoryPermissions.description: Advisory list of tools recommended for this state (not enforced)

tools.name: transition
tools.description: Transition a flow instance to a new state.

instancePath.description: Absolute path to the flow instance .yaml file

advisoryPermissions.description: Advisory list of tools recommended for this state (not enforced)

tools.name: cat
tools.description: Read entire file contents to stdout

path.description: Path to the file to read

tools.name: edit
tools.description: Edit a file by replacing exact string matches

path.description: Path to the file to edit

oldString.description: Exact string to find and replace

tools.name: find
tools.description: Find files and directories by pattern

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search file contents with regex pattern matching

path.description: File or directory to search in

tools.name: head
tools.description: Read first N lines of a file

path.description: Path to the file to read from

tools.name: list
tools.description: List directory contents with metadata

path.description: Directory path to list contents of

tools.name: ls
tools.description: List directory contents with metadata

path.description: Directory path to list contents of

tools.name: mkdir
tools.description: Create directories

recursive.description: Create parent directories as needed (default: true)

tools.name: read
tools.description: Read file contents from the filesystem

path.description: Path to the file to read (absolute or relative)

tools.name: sandbox_write
tools.description: Write to /tmp safely for intermediary artifacts

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: stat
tools.description: Get file or directory metadata

path.description: Path to the file or directory to get metadata for

tools.name: tail
tools.description: Read last N lines of a file

path.description: Path to the file to read from

tools.name: write
tools.description: Write content to a file on the filesystem

path.description: Path to the file to write (absolute or relative)

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: analyze_efficiency
tools.description: Analyze a session for efficiency improvements. Detects redundant calls (identical input within 5 minutes), identifies slow tools (>2x average), and finds error patterns (>30% failure rate). Provides actionable suggestions for optimization.

session_id.description: Session ID to analyze. If not provided, uses the most recent session.

tools.name: get_session_summary
tools.description: Retrieve a summary of a session including tool counts, duration, file changes, and success rates. If no session_id is provided, uses the most recent session. Results are cached for 5 minutes.

session_id.description: Session ID. If not provided, uses the most recent session.

tools.name: get_tool_history
tools.description: Query tool call history with optional filters by session ID, tool name, or status. Supports pagination with limit and offset. Returns timing information for each call.

tools.name: get_tool_stats
tools.description: Retrieve aggregate statistics for tools across all sessions. Optionally filter by tool name or limit to a specific number of days. Returns call counts, success rates, and timing metrics (average, min, max duration).

days.description: Limit to last N days (optional, default: all time)

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create a new Cloudflare Pages project.

name.description: Project name (lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens, e.g. 'my-site')

production_branch.description: Git branch to treat as production (defaults to 'main')

tools.name: deploy_html
tools.description: Deploy HTML (and other static) files directly to a Cloudflare Pages project.

project_name.description: Name of the Pages project to deploy to

files.description: Map of file paths to file contents, e.g. { "/index.html": "<html>...</html>" }

branch.description: Branch name to associate with this deployment (optional)

tools.name: generate_theme
tools.description: Generate a Tailwind CSS theme configuration

primaryHue.description: Primary brand hue (sky, violet, rose, amber, emerald, slate, neutral)

neutralHue.description: Neutral hue for grayscale palette (slate or neutral)

tools.name: get_deployment
tools.description: Get details for a specific Cloudflare Pages deployment.

deployment_id.description: ID of the deployment to retrieve

tools.name: gutenberg_list_components
tools.description: List all available page component types and variants

tools.name: gutenberg_preview_component
tools.description: Preview a single component in isolation

component.description: Component definition object with type and properties

tools.name: gutenberg_render_page
tools.description: Parse and render a full HTML page from a page schema definition

schema.description: Page schema defining layout and sections

tools.name: gutenberg_validate_schema
tools.description: Validate a page schema and return errors and warnings

tools.name: list_components
tools.description: List all available component types and variants

tools.name: list_deployments
tools.description: List all deployments for a Cloudflare Pages project.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all Cloudflare Pages projects for the configured account.

tools.name: preview_component
tools.description: Preview a single component in isolation

section.description: Section object with type and component-specific properties

tools.name: render_page
tools.description: Render a full HTML page from a Gutenberg page schema

schema.description: Page schema as a YAML string or a plain object. Must have a 'page.sections' array.

tools.name: snapshot_page
tools.description: Render a page spec, deploy to Cloudflare Pages preview, and capture a screenshot for visual QA.

spec_path.description: Absolute path to the page specification YAML file

project_name.description: Cloudflare Pages project name to deploy snapshot preview to

full_page.description: Capture entire scrollable page instead of viewport only (default: true)

snapshot_path.description: Local path to saved PNG screenshot

preview_url.description: Live preview URL on Cloudflare Pages

tools.name: validate_schema
tools.description: Validate a Gutenberg page schema and return detailed errors and warnings

schema.description: Page schema to validate as a YAML string or a plain object.

valid.description: True if schema has no blocking errors
